records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagte, sie wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A new contract?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A new contract?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A new contract?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If there are any changes to the contract, please contact the Valentinus Monastery...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If there are any changes to the contract, please contact the Valentinus Monastery...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If there are any changes to the contract, please contact the Valentinus Monastery...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You want to help me find a way to break my curse together?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You want to help me find a way to break my curse together?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You want to help me find a way to break my curse together?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlimited daily grape juice in exchange for permission to stay by your side...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlimited daily grape juice in exchange for permission to stay by your side...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlimited daily grape juice in exchange for permission to stay by your side...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not some greedy opportunist like Junk food, who only cares about profit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not some greedy opportunist like Junk food, who only cares about profit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not some greedy opportunist like Junk food, who only cares about profit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No matter how sweet the offer, I won't fall for such temptations.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No matter how sweet the offer, I won't fall for such temptations.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No matter how sweet the offer, I won't fall for such temptations.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I should first wipe off my drool?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I should first wipe off my drool?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I should first wipe off my drool?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-this is just an uncontrollable instinct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-this is just an uncontrollable instinct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-this is just an uncontrollable instinct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: How am I supposed to just sit here when you smell so delicious?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How am I supposed to just sit here when you smell so delicious?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How am I supposed to just sit here when you smell so delicious?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're actually letting me stay near you... I can't tell if you're fearless or just have something up your sleeve...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're actually letting me stay near you... I can't tell if you're fearless or just have something up your sleeve...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're actually letting me stay near you... I can't tell if you're fearless or just have something up your sleeve...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ask, and you shall receive. Seek, and you shall find. Knock, and the door will be opened to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ask, and you shall receive. Seek, and you shall find. Knock, and the door will be opened to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ask, and you shall receive. Seek, and you shall find. Knock, and the door will be opened to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So in the end, it means I have to find a way to break the curse myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So in the end, it means I have to find a way to break the curse myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So in the end, it means I have to find a way to break the curse myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I happened to hear something at the company. It turns out you're quite the big deal, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I happened to hear something at the company. It turns out you're quite the big deal, aren't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I happened to hear something at the company. It turns out you're quite the big deal, aren't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, maybe you really will find a way to break my curse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, maybe you really will find a way to break my curse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, maybe you really will find a way to break my curse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll trust you. After all, trust is something we can keep building over time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll trust you. After all, trust is something we can keep building over time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll trust you. After all, trust is something we can keep building over time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As a token of trust... would it be okay if I left a bite mark on your neck?
records.m_Talk_DEU: As a token of trust... would it be okay if I left a bite mark on your neck?
records.m_Talk_FRA: As a token of trust... would it be okay if I left a bite mark on your neck?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll make sure you don't get lightheaded from blood loss.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll make sure you don't get lightheaded from blood loss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll make sure you don't get lightheaded from blood loss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sign it first, you say? Ugh, all right...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sign it first, you say? Ugh, all right...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sign it first, you say? Ugh, all right...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once I sign, I'm allowed to take a bite, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once I sign, I'm allowed to take a bite, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once I sign, I'm allowed to take a bite, right?
